action_facts.name: GetSetupPINReceived
action_facts.description: Server received GetSetupPIN request

action_facts.name: RateLimitCheck
action_facts.description: Rate limit check evaluated for request scope

action_facts.name: RateLimitExceeded
action_facts.description: Request rejected due to rate limiting

action_facts.name: RateLimitOK
action_facts.description: Rate limit not exceeded for this request

action_facts.name: AccountLookupSuccess
action_facts.description: Account found for given TempAccountIdentifier

action_facts.name: AccountLookupFailed
action_facts.description: No account found for TempAccountIdentifier

action_facts.name: ActiveAccountRead
action_facts.description: Active account for content app was read

action_facts.name: AccountMatch
action_facts.description: Requested account matches active account

action_facts.name: AccountMismatch
action_facts.description: Requested account does not match active account

action_facts.name: TempIdValidated
action_facts.description: Temporary Account Identifier confirmed not expired

action_facts.name: TempIdExpired
action_facts.description: Temporary Account Identifier has expired

action_facts.name: SetupPINGenerated
action_facts.description: Setup PIN obtained for account

action_facts.name: SetupPINReturned
action_facts.description: Non-empty SetupPIN returned to client

action_facts.name: EmptyPINReturned
action_facts.description: Empty SetupPIN returned due to mismatch, expiration, or missing account

action_facts.name: LoginReceived
action_facts.description: Server received Login command

action_facts.name: LoginRateLimitCheck
action_facts.description: Rate limit check for Login evaluated

action_facts.name: LoginRateLimitExceeded
action_facts.description: Login request rejected due to rate limiting

action_facts.name: LoginRateLimitOK
action_facts.description: Login rate limit not exceeded for this request

action_facts.name: LoginTempIdValidated
action_facts.description: Login flow confirmed that Temporary Account Identifier is not expired

action_facts.name: LoginTempIdExpired
action_facts.description: Login flow found that Temporary Account Identifier is expired

action_facts.name: LoginAccountLookupSuccess
action_facts.description: Login flow successfully mapped temp_id to an account

action_facts.name: LoginAccountLookupFailed
action_facts.description: Login flow failed to map temp_id to an account

action_facts.name: SetupPINValidated
action_facts.description: SetupPIN confirmed valid for account

action_facts.name: SetupPINInvalid
action_facts.description: SetupPIN not valid for account

action_facts.name: PolicyAllowAutoLogin
action_facts.description: Policy allows automatic login for this account

action_facts.name: PolicyDenyAutoLogin
action_facts.description: Policy does not allow automatic login for this account

action_facts.name: AccountActivated
action_facts.description: Account set as active for Content App

action_facts.name: NodeAccessGranted
action_facts.description: Node granted access to Content App

action_facts.name: LoginSuccess
action_facts.description: Login completed successfully

action_facts.name: LoginFailed
action_facts.description: Login rejected with reason

action_facts.name: LogoutReceived
action_facts.description: Logout command received

action_facts.name: NoActiveAccountCondition
action_facts.description: Condition that there is no active account when Logout is processed

action_facts.name: AccountDeactivated
action_facts.description: Account cleared from Content App

action_facts.name: NodeLogoutRecorded
action_facts.description: Node-specific logout recorded

action_facts.name: GlobalLogoutRecorded
action_facts.description: Global logout recorded

action_facts.name: LoggedOutEvent
action_facts.description: LoggedOut event emitted by content app

action_facts.name: NodeAccessRevoked
action_facts.description: Node access to Content App revoked by Fabric Admin

action_facts.name: RateLimitWindowActive
action_facts.description: Rate limiting window is being enforced for endpoint

states.name: NoActiveAccount
states.description: Content app has no active account associated

states.name: ActiveAccount
states.description: Content app has an active account set

states.name: RateLimited
states.description: Rate limit currently exceeded for some scope on this endpoint

transitions.guard_condition: rate_limit_exceeded == TRUE
transitions.description: GetSetupPIN rejected due to rate limiting; empty PIN returned

transitions.guard_condition: rate_limit_exceeded == FALSE && account_found == TRUE && active_account_matches == TRUE && temp_id_valid == TRUE
transitions.description: GetSetupPIN succeeds with non-empty PIN: rate limit OK, temp_id valid, and account matches active account

transitions.guard_condition: rate_limit_exceeded == FALSE && account_found == FALSE
transitions.description: GetSetupPIN returns empty PIN when no account is found for temp_id

transitions.guard_condition: rate_limit_exceeded == FALSE && account_found == TRUE && active_account_matches == FALSE
transitions.description: GetSetupPIN returns empty PIN when requested account does not match active account

transitions.guard_condition: rate_limit_exceeded == FALSE && account_found == TRUE && active_account_matches == TRUE && temp_id_valid == FALSE
transitions.description: GetSetupPIN returns empty PIN when temp_id is expired despite account match

transitions.guard_condition: rate_limit_exceeded == TRUE
transitions.description: GetSetupPIN rejected due to rate limiting; occurs when an account is already active

transitions.guard_condition: rate_limit_exceeded == FALSE && account_found == TRUE && active_account_matches == TRUE && temp_id_valid == TRUE
transitions.description: GetSetupPIN returns non-empty PIN when active account matches and temp_id is valid

transitions.guard_condition: rate_limit_exceeded == FALSE && account_found == FALSE
transitions.description: GetSetupPIN returns empty PIN when no account found; active account state unchanged

transitions.guard_condition: rate_limit_exceeded == FALSE && account_found == TRUE && active_account_matches == FALSE
transitions.description: GetSetupPIN returns empty PIN when mapped account does not match currently active account

transitions.guard_condition: rate_limit_exceeded == FALSE && account_found == TRUE && active_account_matches == TRUE && temp_id_valid == FALSE
transitions.description: GetSetupPIN returns empty PIN when temp_id expired; active account remains

transitions.guard_condition: rate_limit_exceeded == TRUE
transitions.description: GetSetupPIN rejected while rate limiting is active

transitions.guard_condition: rate_limit_exceeded == TRUE
transitions.description: Login rejected due to rate limiting, no active account

transitions.guard_condition: rate_limit_exceeded == FALSE && temp_id_valid == FALSE
transitions.description: Login rejected because temp_id is expired

transitions.guard_condition: rate_limit_exceeded == FALSE && temp_id_valid == TRUE && account_found == FALSE
transitions.description: Login rejected because no account is mapped to temp_id

transitions.guard_condition: rate_limit_exceeded == FALSE && temp_id_valid == TRUE && account_found == TRUE && pin_valid == FALSE
transitions.description: Login rejected because provided PIN is invalid for the account

transitions.guard_condition: rate_limit_exceeded == FALSE && temp_id_valid == TRUE && account_found == TRUE && pin_valid == TRUE && policy_auto_login == FALSE
transitions.description: Login succeeds logically (e.g., mapping service) but policy does not auto-activate account; no state change

transitions.guard_condition: rate_limit_exceeded == FALSE && temp_id_valid == TRUE && account_found == TRUE && pin_valid == TRUE && policy_auto_login == TRUE && node_present == FALSE
transitions.description: Login succeeds and policy allows auto-activation; account becomes active without node-specific access granted

transitions.guard_condition: rate_limit_exceeded == FALSE && temp_id_valid == TRUE && account_found == TRUE && pin_valid == TRUE && policy_auto_login == TRUE && node_present == TRUE
transitions.description: Login succeeds with auto-activation and node is granted access

transitions.guard_condition: rate_limit_exceeded == TRUE
transitions.description: Login rejected due to rate limiting when account is already active

transitions.guard_condition: rate_limit_exceeded == FALSE && temp_id_valid == TRUE && account_found == TRUE && pin_valid == TRUE && policy_auto_login == TRUE && node_present == TRUE
transitions.description: Login succeeds with policy auto-login and node access when already in ActiveAccount state

transitions.guard_condition: rate_limit_exceeded == TRUE
transitions.description: Login rejected while rate limiting is active

transitions.guard_condition: current_account == NULL
transitions.description: Logout when no active account; succeeds with no further effect

transitions.guard_condition: current_account != NULL && node_present == TRUE
transitions.description: Logout with node parameter; clears active account and emits LoggedOut with node

transitions.guard_condition: current_account != NULL && node_present == FALSE
transitions.description: Logout without node; clears active account and emits LoggedOut with null node

fresh_values.name: setup_pin
fresh_values.description: Generated or retrieved Setup PIN for PASE for a given account

fresh_values.name: scope
fresh_values.description: Scope identifier for rate limiting decisions

security_properties.description: Any accepted GetSetupPIN request must be within an active rate limit window
security_properties.source: timing: ≤10 unique GetSetupPIN requests per 10 minutes

security_properties.description: Non-empty SetupPIN can only be returned if the Temporary Account Identifier was validated as not expired
LoginSuccess requires that temp_id is validated, account lookup succeeded, and SetupPIN is valid for that account
Any LoggedOutEvent for a node eventually leads to NodeAccessRevoked for that node and account
security_properties.source: LoggedOut event summary: Fabric Admin SHALL remove access for the specified Node

security_properties.description: AccountActivated must only occur when PolicyAllowAutoLogin holds for that account
security_properties.source: Login effect_on_receipt: if policy_allow_auto_login(acct) then set_active_account_for_content_app(acct)

security_properties.description: NodeAccessGranted must only occur for accounts that are active on the endpoint
security_properties.source: Login effect_on_receipt: grant_content_app_access_to_node(acct, Node) occurs only after set_active_account_for_content_app(acct)
